233 CNCRNT_OT_WK_1_NUM CNCRNT_OT_WK_1_NUM O0401BB OT: Total Minutes Concurrent Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of concurrent occupational therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
234 GRP_OT_WK_1_NUM GRP_OT_WK_1_NUM O0401BC OT: Total Minutes Group Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of group occupational therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
